{{Quote|I could see that we were close to Alderaan's star, and this was where Alderaan should have been…|Luke Skywalker, upon entering the Alderaan system after Alderaan's destruction|<ref name="Star Wars Journal: The Fight for Justice">''[[Star Wars Journal: The Fight for Justice]]''</ref>}}
'''Alderaan''' was the primary of the [[Alderaan system/Legends|Alderaan system]]. It was originally [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. After the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]], however, it became an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] called [[The Graveyard]].
